sections.paragraph:
m.-

(1) a graving tool, Exo 32:4.

(2) a style, with which letters were inscribed on wood or stone; hence poetically used of a kind of writing, Isa 8:1, בְּחֶרֶט אֱנֹושׁ “with the style of a man” (of the common people), i.e. with letters of the common sort, such as the common people might easily read.
